case_title: ROSEMARIE MAC GUINNESS VS. DAVID HECKENLIVELY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY MAC GUINNESS, ROSEMARIE HECKENLIVELY, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAC GUINNESS, ROSEMARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HECKENLIVELY, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
